allowed_next_actions: Modify the controlled Star Reflection public UI surface.
Create or modify public controller code for non-persistent runtime requests.
Create a rule-based resolver for AG75B states.
Load and select from the immutable AG75C output bank.
Call the existing public Panchang Edge Function without browser secrets.
required_next_controls: Use the existing closed SUP02 calculate-panchang function only.
Map AG75B resolution states to exactly one AG75C record.
Select exact records only after complete-minute transition-window proof.
Keep unknown-time Nakshatra explicitly labelled as day context.
Render pending, invalid, unavailable, error and ambiguity states distinctly.
Keep all personal inputs session-only and non-persistent.
Do not place service-role or other secrets in browser code.
Do not modify the AG75C bank during public wiring.
Preserve reflective, symbolic and non-deterministic output language.
Complete browser, privacy, failure-state and responsive QA before AG75E.
blocked_actions: Database migration or direct browser database write.
Personal-input persistence in storage, logs or analytics.
Output-bank mutation or generation in the browser.
